    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.comment(String value)
    Sends a heartbeat/comment line.
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.flush()
    Flushes pending output.
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.heartbeat(Duration interval)
    Starts periodic heartbeat comments.
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.sendEvent(String name, Object data)
    Sends an SSE event from name+data values.
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.sendEvent(SseEvent event)
    Sends an SSE event.
    SseResponseSupport
    SseResponseSupport.sendFrom(SseSubscription subscription)
    Drains a subscription until disconnect or interruption.
